text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: The ocean!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
No sooner do we arrive at summer camp than Fine Motion takes off to
marvel at the sea.
choice_data_list: Fine, is this your first time at a beach?

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: No, far from it. Though it is the first time I've been to one with so many friends. It's like a dream come true.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Hehe, the sensation of sand between my toes, and just... everything. It feels like such a treasure to be here!
choice_data_list: The perfect place to spread your wings, isn't it?

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
It really is! Oh—is that a hermit crab? I wonder if it's looking for a new
shell.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Hey, little guy. Can I help you look? I bet this beach is full of
beautiful shells!

text_block_list.name: Fine's Friend A
text_block_list.text:
All right, are we all ready to run some laps? ...Hang on, where'd Fine
go?

text_block_list.name: Fine's Friend B
text_block_list.text:
Oh, there she is! Looks like she's already started jogging! C'mon, let's
hurry and catch up!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Fine Motion runs down the shoreline, beaming. Time flies, and camp
goes by in a happy blur.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Before we know it, it's the evening of our last night. Fine and I decide
to spend it at the local festival.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Mmm, that was lovely! What was "candy floss" in Japanese, again?
"Wata-ame," right? The way it melts in your mouth is so delightful!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
...Hehe. All this training, and playing, and cooking, and treasure
hunts. Ghost stories and now a big festival... This camp really had it
all.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Ah! Fireworks!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: They're so... so beautiful...

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
...And then in a blink, they're memories—like all the other precious
moments we shared.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
I think, maybe it's their fleeting nature that makes them linger so
vividly in the mind when they're gone. Do you know what I mean?

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
...Ah, no, I'm sorry. I hope I didn't spoil the festival mood with the
sentimental talk.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
What do you say we give the stalls another round? I spotted a sign for
jumbo takoyaki down that way!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We wander for a while, chatting and snacking, and end summer camp
on a high note.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Whew! That's the whole training set for today, I believe. It feels like
it's been forever since I ran on the academy track.
choice_data_list:
Everything's settled back into the usual routine,
huh?

Everything's settled back into the usual routine,
huh?

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Agreed. Although, you never know when life will surprise you.
choice_data_list: Is that a cue for another dragon attack?

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Ahaha, I'm afraid not this time. Though it would be fun to have little
surprises like the lost kitty. You know, just from time to time.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Well, I don't know what I expected. Not that I want there to be lost pets, mind you. Ahaha.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: ...Eh? Is this... instant ramen? Was this always here?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I almost forgot. When I cleaned up after our feline visitor, I moved my
emergency snack stash. I can't believe I left ramen out where Fine
could see it...

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Ooh, Shura Ramen III? I don't think I've ever seen this kind!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Really?! Thank you, Trainer! Let me boil some water...
choice_data_list:
Now? Are you sure? I don't have anything else
to put in it.

Now? Are you sure? I don't have anything else
to put in it.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: ...Hm? What do you mean? I thought you only needed water.
choice_data_list:
But you could add other ingredients if you
wanted. Aside from the fridge being empty, I
mean.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
You... can? You can add other things?! But that means... the
possibilities are infinite!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Oh my goodness! My mind is racing with ideas already! I have to try
them all!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Trainer! Why don't we make a quick grocery run? Let's make our very
own ramen together!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And without a moment's delay, we're out the door, on our way to
explore the noodley miracles of the local market.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Hmm hm hmm hm hmmm ♪ We've got sprouts, lettuce, mushrooms,
minced meat, and eggs.

text_block_list.name: Fine's Friend A
text_block_list.text: Ah, hey Fine! Whatcha up to?

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Hehehe. Well, my trainer and I are planning to test the best toppings
for instant ramen, so we're out buying ingredients.

text_block_list.name: Fine's Friend B
text_block_list.text:
Ramen toppings? I guess you could try some random meat and
cabbage. That's what we'd usually toss in back home.

text_block_list.name: Fine's Friend A
text_block_list.text:
My dad would always put weird pub snacks in ours. Like he'd put
dried salami in, and call it his house special...

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Ooh, you've made original ramen before? You have to tell me more! We could all have a big ramen tasting party!

text_block_list.name: Fine's Friend B
text_block_list.text:
If we play our cards right, Fine'll make it a high-society sensation or
something. Can you imagine—royal instant ramen!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With Fine's friends along for the ride, we grab a couple more
ingredients and head back to my office.

text_block_list.name: Everyone
text_block_list.text: Sláinte!

text_block_list.name: Fine's Friend A
text_block_list.text:
Mmm... Y'know, this salami isn't half bad. It's kinda like those pork
flavor packets, but actual meat.

text_block_list.name: Fine's Friend B
text_block_list.text:
The crab sticks I put in work pretty well too. They add like, I dunno...
an extra layer of flavor, I guess?

text_block_list.name: Fine's Friend A
text_block_list.text:
...An "extra layer." I bet you sound like a food reporter in your head,
huh?

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Ahaha! They really do taste completely different, though. I might try
making it for my parents some time, when I'm back.

text_block_list.name: Fine's Friend B
text_block_list.text:
Now we're talking! If any of their friends in high places want my secret
recipe, I wouldn't mind sharing—as long as they pay me royalties.

text_block_list.name: Fine's Friend A
text_block_list.text:
Please. As if you invented grocery store ramen. Can it, or your
masterpiece is gonna go cold.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Exactly, and the noodles go limp if they sit too long. Ramen is best
right in the moment!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: It... it all is, isn't it?

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Hehe... Nothing, I just realized something important, thanks to you
three.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Big special events are all well and good, but I don't have to make
everything an occasion.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
There's a lot to be said for simply enjoying the time I get to spend
with you here and now. Every day is a treasure.
choice_data_list: ...Yeah. I think you're on to something.
...Yeah. I think you're on to something.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Hehe. Well then, before things go cold...

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Let's savor what's in front of us. We can waffle on about the future
when it gets here. Right?
